title: Ferreries Summer Night Market
description: Every summer Friday, Ferreries' Plaça d'Espanya hosts a night market with local crafts and typical Menorcan produce, enlivened by open-air performances (roughly 19:00 to 23:00). A serene way to spend the evening strolling among artisan stalls. Summer season approximate; confirm dates and hours with the Ajuntament de Ferreries.
